text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp, a time for Tracen Academy students to train at the
beach and push their abilities to new heights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Well... That's what it's supposed to be.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woooow! Feel this energy? The adventure's about to start!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We should be at the campground on the beach, but somehow we've
ended up in this forest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a desperate attempt to clear my confusion, I try to recall how we
got here...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The waves! The wind! The thunderous squalls! I can hear the sea
calling!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But it must wait! Another place calls!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The forest! In the deepest woods is where beetles wage war for sap.
Only there can I draw out my latent power!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Raise anchors, Trainer! We're outta here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Boarding pass—check. Cards, chess, checkers, and go board for the
plane ride—check

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: There, that's everything! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Woohooo! Green as far as the eye can see! Now begins our true camp
of summer!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: To the forest we go! It's time to catch bugs!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We should be at the summer camp by now, but for some reason, the
two of us are wandering around a forest...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, a rainbow-colored mushroom! Hey, those things are edible, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw heck, what's a little poison, huh? Shouldn't be anything more than
a minor emergency!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Right, nothing major...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm Gold Ship's trainer. It's about time I check that wild spirit of hers!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What's up with you? You're all quiet. Come on, we're about to go bug
collecting.
choice_data_list:
I've got a better idea. Let's explore some
ancient ruins!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huuuuuh?! You feeling okay? 'Cause that sounds amazing!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm? Beep-beep! Beep, beep! Golshi Radar signal detected! The ruins are thataway!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: To me, my trainer! There are vast riches waiting to be discovered!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're off and running through the trees on Gold Ship's big summer
adventure!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hmm, a fork in the road. Do we go right? Or left...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait... I'm the mighty Gold Ship—I reject these options and substitute
my own!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: We go through, Trainer! We don't follow in someone's footsteps, we carve new paths for our own!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wait, whoooa! Why's there a cliff?! I can't stooop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly we're running down a steep slope through the thick brush!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha! Heck yeah, this is the best!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... I know I'm amazing, but that was so much running. Even I'm tired.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But you kept up the whole way. Not bad, Trainer.
choice_data_list: You deserve the best, after all.
You deserve the best, after all.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh? Nicely said, my fine fellow! You'll be top-class yet!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Then I've got a little gift for ya... Check it out. The sun's setting over
the sea.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All this scenery, the adventure, and everything! This is what I've
always wanted to show you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aw, I just made that up. Doesn't change how good this view is
though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole ocean is sparkling in the sunset. It looks just like a crowd
of fans waving light sticks at a winning concert.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm really pumped to see all sorts of other stuff with you too.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So let's aim for the big one together—being the world's greatest
treasure hunters!
choice_data_list: I'm with you to the end!
I'm with you to the end!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! Towards the sun we go! Only a true Umamusume gets the
urge to run into the sunset!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: URAAAAGH! With me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, I have no idea what she's actually talking about, but I feel
that the adventure has really narrowed the distance between us.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: How the heck should I know?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although we're unsure of where to go, we make it out of the
wilderness and back to Tracen Academy... together.
